name: Chocolate Covered Chocolate Cake Truffles
recipeIngredient: 1 package Devil's food cake mix; 18 oz
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 9 x 5-inch loaf baking pan with nonstick spray.
2. Bake the cake according to package instructions.
3. Let cool.
4. Melt butter in a saucepan, stir in cocoa and sugar. Add nuts and liqueur. Turn off heat.
5. Crumble cake into the mixture in the saucepan and mix by hand until well blended, tasting frequently.
6. Roll into 1-1/2-inch balls.
7. Melt chocolate in a bowl in the microwave (add 1 tbsp vegetable oil to thin if necessary).
8. Dip balls one at a time, completely covering them with chocolate.
9. Place on wax paper to dry.
10. Store, covered in a cool, dry place.
